bugs.summary: The patch blocks partial-source stages after failed or skipped terminal dependencies.
bugs.impact: Stages declaring sourcePolicy partial can deadlock or skip instead of synthesizing available successful sources and reporting partial failures.
acceptableFixes: Add a scheduler regression where a partial join proceeds after one failed upstream task.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.
Relying on git history instead of the sanitized workspace and proposed patch.
Assuming every holdout task contains a seeded bug.

difficulty.rationale: Looks like stricter dependency gating but violates partial sourcePolicy semantics.

approvedBy: repro.sh RED/GREEN or no-op revert check
approval.notes: Local blind holdout locked before calibration runs; provider review pending before promotion to primary release gate.
